upstream.test: should handle correctly relative paths

entries.reason: Equivalent named-template inheritance is exercised through Nunjitsu's immutable memory loader and asynchronous render API.

upstream.test: should handle correctly cache for relative paths

entries.reason: Nunjitsu has no persistent compiled-template cache; the equivalent parent-aware resolution and render-local canonical deduplication behavior is ported.

upstream.test: should handle correctly relative paths in renderString

entries.reason: Inline source supplies an explicit canonicalName instead of the Nunjucks renderString path option, preserving equivalent relative inheritance behavior.

upstream.test: should allow a simple loader to be created

entries.reason: The runtime suite renders a named template through Nunjitsu's minimal asynchronous TemplateLoader interface instead of subclassing a Nunjucks loader.

upstream.test: should catch loader error

entries.reason: Asynchronous loader exceptions reject the render promise, recycle a suspended worker, and leave the engine usable for the next render.

upstream.test: should have default opts for WebLoader

entries.reason: Browser execution and the Nunjucks WebLoader class are outside the documented compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should emit a "load" event

entries.reason: Browser execution and Nunjucks loader event APIs are outside the documented compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should have default opts

entries.reason: Nunjitsu deliberately has no implicit cwd loader or persistent loader cache; its filesystem loader requires explicit roots.

upstream.test: should emit a "load" event

entries.reason: The new loader capability is promise-based and does not emulate Nunjucks loader event emitters.

upstream.test: should have default opts

entries.reason: The NodeResolveLoader class and its cache options are part of the replaced Nunjucks JavaScript loader API.

upstream.test: should emit a "load" event

entries.reason: The new loader capability does not emulate NodeResolveLoader or Nunjucks loader event emitters.

upstream.test: should render templates

entries.reason: The runtime suite verifies that an explicit custom loader can resolve a package-style template name and render its copied source.

upstream.test: should not allow directory traversal

entries.reason: Nunjitsu's explicit-root filesystem loader rejects absolute names, lexical traversal, and canonical symlink escape through its documented security model.

upstream.test: should return null if no match

entries.reason: The runtime suite verifies ordered fallthrough when loaders return null and a terminal TemplateNotFoundError when none match.

upstream.test: should report the failed function calls to symbols

entries.reason: Calling an undefined symbol rejects with Nunjitsu's structured render error; exact Nunjucks diagnostic text is outside the compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should report the failed function calls to lookups

entries.reason: Calling an undefined bracket lookup rejects semantically; exact rendered function paths in diagnostic text are outside the compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should report the failed function calls to calls

entries.reason: Calling an undefined dotted lookup rejects semantically; exact rendered function paths in diagnostic text are outside the compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should report full function name in error

entries.reason: Long undefined lookup calls reject without truncation affecting evaluation; Nunjitsu does not claim compatibility for exact diagnostic formatting.

upstream.test: should report the failed function calls w/multiple args

entries.reason: Undefined dotted and bracket calls reject with multiple arguments as they do with one; exact diagnostic paths are outside the compatibility contract.

upstream.test: should allow for undefined macro arguments in the last position
should allow for objects without a prototype macro arguments in the last position

entries.reason: The runtime suite passes the same null-prototype record as the final macro argument through Nunjitsu's copied safe-value boundary and verifies its property output.

upstream.test: should not read variables property from Object.prototype

entries.reason: Nunjitsu intentionally copies own properties only and renders a polluted inherited property as undefined, enforcing the documented safe-value boundary instead of exposing prototype data.

upstream.test: should allow overriding var with none inside nested scope

entries.reason: Nunjitsu's evaluator is uniformly resumable: ordinary control flow, asyncEach, and asyncAll all suspend on asynchronous filters and loaders. Runtime tests cover capability and include suspension, while the shared cases cover the async loop spellings.

entries.reason: Nunjitsu does not expose Nunjucks Environment instances or a mutable global getter API.

upstream.test: should fail on getting non-existent global

upstream.test: should pass context as this to global functions

entries.reason: The new capability API does not emulate Nunjucks this.lookup; global arguments are copied explicitly and callbacks receive a render-owned AbortSignal.
